title: Liberation of Ord Mantell
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ord Mantell}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Mandalore]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |conc= |next= |image= |name=Liberation of Ord Mantell |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}}''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |date=c. [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] |place=[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] |result=[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] victory |side1=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side2=[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]]{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}} |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']]''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=*[[Mandalorian Supercommando]]s *[[Gladiator-class assault fighter|''Gladiator''-class fighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Boba-running with a bunch of other guys in Mandalorian armor and jet packs. He even managed to come up with a new Firespray.''"
"''Well, I wasn't going to say anything, but I heard that that same bunch showed up to help liberate Ord Mantell.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Talon Karrde]]|}} Late in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] under [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] '''liberated''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] control. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Ord Mantell (29 NSY)#legends |es=Liberación de Ord Mantell |pl=Bitwa o Ord Mantell (29 ABY) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ord Mantell, liberation of}} [[Category:Battles of Ord Mantell]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
